_note: Managed SAST suppression register. Every entry requires id, owner, expires (ISO 8601 date), and justification. Expired suppressions block CI until renewed or removed.

checkov.justification: HTTP listener only created when HTTPS is disabled (dev/test). Planned: enforce HTTPS-only listeners across all environments.
ECR tag mutability required for current CI/CD image push workflow. Planned: migrate to immutable tags with SHA-based image references.
ALB access logging requires an S3 bucket with correct bucket policy. Planned: add logging bucket and enable access logs on the ALB.
HTTP listener exists only when enable_https is false (non-production). TLS 1.2 is enforced on the HTTPS listener. Planned: remove HTTP listener entirely and enforce HTTPS across all environments.
RDS enhanced monitoring requires an IAM role for the monitoring agent. Planned: add monitoring IAM role and enable enhanced monitoring at 60s granularity.
RDS PostgreSQL log exports (postgresql, upgrade) not yet configured. Planned: enable enabled_cloudwatch_logs_exports for postgresql and upgrade log types.
Public subnets assign public IPs by design for ALB and NAT gateway placement. Risk accepted: no EC2 instances are launched in public subnets; only managed AWS resources (ALB, NAT GW) use them.
ALB does not yet drop invalid HTTP headers. Planned: set drop_invalid_header_fields = true on the ALB resource.
ECR repositories use default AES-256 encryption. Planned: add KMS CMK encryption for ECR to enable key rotation and audit via CloudTrail.
Secrets Manager secret uses default AWS-managed encryption. Planned: add KMS CMK for Secrets Manager to enable key rotation and audit.
ALB deletion protection is controlled by var.db_deletion_protection but currently defaults to false. Planned: enable deletion protection for production workloads via variable override.
RDS Multi-AZ is controlled by var.db_multi_az but defaults to false. Planned: enable Multi-AZ for production to ensure HA failover.
CloudWatch Log Groups use default encryption. Planned: add KMS CMK encryption for log groups to comply with encryption-at-rest policy.
RDS uses password-based auth via Secrets Manager. Planned: enable IAM database authentication as an additional access control layer.
RDS auto_minor_version_upgrade not explicitly set. Planned: set auto_minor_version_upgrade = true to receive security patches automatically.
ALB security group allows inbound port 80 from 0.0.0.0/0 for HTTP-to-HTTPS redirect. Planned: restrict port 80 ingress once HTTPS is enforced across all environments.
RDS deletion protection controlled by var.db_deletion_protection, currently defaults to false. Planned: enforce deletion_protection = true for production via variable override.
CloudWatch log retention is 30 days; policy requires 365 days. Planned: increase retention_in_days to 365 for production log groups.
RDS Performance Insights not enabled. Planned: enable performance_insights_enabled with KMS encryption for production database monitoring.
Target groups use HTTP protocol for ALB-to-ECS communication within the VPC. Planned: evaluate end-to-end TLS with HTTPS target groups once ECS tasks support TLS termination.
Security groups allow unrestricted egress (0.0.0.0/0) for ECS tasks to pull images and reach AWS APIs. Planned: restrict egress to specific CIDR ranges and VPC endpoints.
VPC flow logging not enabled. Planned: add aws_flow_log resource with CloudWatch Logs destination for network traffic visibility.
Default VPC security group not explicitly locked down. Planned: add aws_default_security_group resource that revokes all ingress/egress rules.
ALB HTTP-to-HTTPS redirect only active when enable_https is true; Checkov cannot evaluate conditional resources. Planned: enforce HTTPS-only and remove the HTTP listener.
Public-facing ALB not protected by WAF. Planned: add aws_wafv2_web_acl with managed rule groups (AWSManagedRulesCommonRuleSet, AWSManagedRulesKnownBadInputsRuleSet) and associate with the ALB.
PostgreSQL query logging not enabled via parameter group. Planned: create aws_db_parameter_group with log_statement = all and log_min_duration_statement = 1000.
Route53 hosted zone DNSSEC signing not enabled. Planned: enable DNSSEC via aws_route53_key_signing_key and aws_route53_hosted_zone_dnssec resources.
Route53 DNS query logging not enabled. Planned: add aws_route53_query_log resource with CloudWatch Log Group destination.
Secrets Manager automatic rotation not configured. Planned: add aws_secretsmanager_secret_rotation with Lambda rotation function for database credentials.
RDS copy_tags_to_snapshot not enabled. Planned: set copy_tags_to_snapshot = true for tag propagation to automated and manual snapshots.
